title: Opening Ceremony & Cultural Parade
description: An energetic opening event featuring traditional drumming, cultural floats, and performances by local schools and community groups. Dignitaries and regional icons join to officially open the festival.

title: Legends’ Night — Arts & Music Tribute
description: A night of live highlife, Afrobeats, and spoken word dedicated to Ghanaian legends including C.K. Mann and Gyedu-Blay Ambolley.

title: Sports Fiesta
description: Friendly competitions and exhibition matches celebrating Western Region’s sports heritage — including a tribute to boxing and athletics legends.

title: Art & Photography Exhibition
description: An open exhibition showcasing regional art, photography, and crafts inspired by Western Ghana’s culture and coastal beauty.

title: The Grand Finale & Awards Gala
description: A glamorous closing night celebrating all honorees, with awards presentations, live performances, and closing remarks from key organizers and partners.
